valid.name: add-column
valid.code: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN email text;

invalid.name: rename-column
invalid.code: ALTER TABLE users RENAME COLUMN email_address TO email;

errors.message: `RENAME COLUMN` breaks every running app that still selects/inserts by the old name. The safer pattern is to add a new column, dual-write, backfill, and drop the old one across separate deploys.
